card.name: CW04 Twinspirit Faeries
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Faerie creature token with flying.

card.name: CW02 Crystalline Guardian
card.text: At the beginning of each opponent's combat phase, tap target creature that player controls.

card.name: CW01 Watchful Crane
card.text: Flying This creature has vigilance if you control another modified creature. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: CW06 Ivory Griffonrider
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, if you control a modified creature, other creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain flying until end of turn. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: CW05 Aerial Assault Unit
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature without flying. Basic landcycling {2W} ({2W}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CW03 Heralded Captain
card.text: Vigilance Infusion — When this creature enters, if you gained life this turn, you may return an artifact or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: CW07 Fae Bloomtender
card.text: Flying Whenever another creature enters, you may gain 1 life.

card.name: CW08 Mischevious Wildsoul
card.text: Flying {2}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CW09 For the Legion!
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 and gain trample and vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: CW10 Decided Strike
card.text: Target attacking or blocking creature gains double strike until end of turn. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to players this turn.

card.name: CW11 Cosmic Smite
card.text: Destroy target tapped creature. Infusion — If you gained life this turn, exile that creature instead and draw a card.

card.name: CW12 Runic Shield
card.text: Destroy target artifact or creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: CW13 One with the Cosmos
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature is an enchantment in addition to its other types. Enchanted creature can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated.

card.name: CW14 Aural Invigoration
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has vigilance. Whenever a white creature you control enters, you may pay {W}. If you do, attach this Aura to it.

card.name: CU01 Azure Corps Duelist
card.text: Vigilance This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.

card.name: CU02 Spirit of the Mists
card.text: When this creature dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: CU03 Merfolk Orator
card.text: When this creature enters, if you control two or more modified creatures, draw a card. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: CU04 Ghasthawk
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand. Basic landcycling {2U} ({2U}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CU05 Rowdy Flock
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card.

card.name: CU06 Consider
card.text: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Draw a card.

card.name: CU09 Forsee Consequences
card.text: Draw two cards. Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: CU08 Diplomatic Consideration
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. If it was put on top, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: CU07 Bar'ryk Reclaims
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. If that creature was an Elemental, draw a card.

card.name: CU10 Upon the Sea and Sky
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+2 until end of turn. Put a flying counter on it.

card.name: CU11 Stray from the Group
card.text: Draw 3 cards. Create a 0/1 blue Spirit creature token with exalted.

card.name: CU12 Sparked Wits
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If you control a modified creature, counter that spell instead. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: CU14 Seafarer's Wings
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has flying. Whenever a blue creature you control enters, you may pay {U}. If you do, attach this Aura to it.

card.name: CU13 Siren's Song
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a 1/1 white Human. (It loses all other colors and types.)

card.name: CB01 Decaying Spirit
card.text: Flying, exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) This creature can't block.

card.name: CB03 Flesh-torn Hellbeast
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: UM01 Hellform Crocodile
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 black and red Elemental creature token. Sacrifice three Elementals: Return target creature with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: CB02 Shadecrow Rooster
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: CB05 Blighted Faerie
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, destroy target nonblack creature that was dealt damage this turn. Basic landcycling {2B} ({2B}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CB06 Direwolf Scourge
card.text: Menace Threshold — Whenever this creature attacks, if there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, it gets +3/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: CB07 Spirit Reap
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: CB08 Murder
card.text: Destroy target creature.

card.name: CB09 Stoneskin Rebuke
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn. tap it.

card.name: CB10 Tragic Betrayal
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or pay {2}. Destroy target creature.

card.name: CB11 Reassemble
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: CB12 Essence Siphon
card.text: Target player discards two cards. Create a 1/1 blue and black Spirit creature token.

card.name: CB13 Pact of Rebirth
card.text: Enchant creature When enchanted creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under your control with a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: CB14 Faeveil Curse
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has lifelink. Whenever a black creature you control enters, you may pay {B}. If you do, attach this Aura to it.

card.name: CR01 Golden Phoenix
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, create a 0/2 colorless Elemental creature token named Ashes.

card.name: CR02 Phoenix Hatchlings
card.text: Haste When this creature dies, add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: CR03 Pyromantic Peafowl
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature deals 1 damage to any target. {R}{R}, Sacrifice an Elemental: Return this creature from the graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: CR04 Kindled-Spirit Wolf
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a tapped Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: CR05 Infernal Dragonkin
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 2/2 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: CR06 Lavabreacher
card.text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another Elemental. If you do, this creature deals 2 damage to any target. Basic landcycling {2R} ({2R}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CR07 Pyretic Flash
card.text: Pyretic Flash deals 3 damage to target creature. Create a 0/2 colorless Elemental creature token named Ashes.

card.name: CR08 Phoenix Crash
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn. At the end of combat, exile it and its controller creates a 0/2 colorless Elemental creature token named Ashes.

card.name: CR09 Abrade
card.text: Choose one — • Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: CR10 Unbridled Fury
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. Creatures you control with haste gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: CR11 Stoke the Blazes
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. If the discarded card was a creature card, create a 2/2 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: CR12 Flamebreath
card.text: Flamebreath deals 4 damage to target creature. Create a 2/2 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: CR13 Wake of Flame
card.text: Wake of Flame deals 6 damage to target creature and 2 damage to that creature's controller.

card.name: CR14 Instilled Wrath
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has menace. Whenever a red creature you control enters, you may pay {R}. If you do, attach this Aura to it.

card.name: CG01 Dragonfly Nymph
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CG02 Blooming Mantis
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters , you may gain 1 life.

card.name: CG05 Vengeful Bramblekin
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature blocks, put a stun counter on the blocked creature.

card.name: CG04 Corrupt Viviomancer
card.text: Whenever another creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: CG03 Cor-Bask Druid
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: CG06 Fungal Titan
card.text: Stampede — When this creature attacks, defending player may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If they don't, This creature gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: CG07 Mossridge Baloth
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, gain 3 life. Basic landcycling {2G} ({2G}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CG08 Flytrap Monstrosity
card.text: Trample Exhaust — {3}{R}: Put 3 +1/+1 counters on this creature. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: CG09 Shield of Lilies
card.text: Gain 3 life. Target creature you control gets +0/+X where X is the amount of life you've gained this turn.

card.name: CG10 Cultivate
card.text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CG11 Hunt and Scavenge
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. When either of those targets dies this turn, draw a card.

card.name: CG12 Ensnaring Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with flying. • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Create a 1/1 red and green Snake creature token.

card.name: UG13 Intimidation Technique
card.text: Stampede — Whenever you attack, defending player may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If they don't, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: CG14 Bayou Nutrients
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has trample. Whenever a green creature you control enters, you may pay {G}. If you do, attach this Aura to it.

card.name: UW01 Abhorrent Elk
card.text: Vigilance Infusion — This creature gets +2/+0 as long as you gained life this turn.

card.name: UW02 Glitterwing Dragoons
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: UW03 Ferocidon Strikeleader
card.text: Double strike When this creature enters, put a first strike counter on up to one other target creature you control.

card.name: UW04 Search and Rescue Unit
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you control another modified creature, look at the top 5 cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card with power 2 or less from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: UW05 Path to Exile
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: UW06 Klysmatic Protection
card.text: Target creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. If that creature is modified, draw a card. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: UW10 Call the Spirits
card.text: Create three 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens. Infusion — If you gained life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on each of those tokens.

card.name: UW08
card.text: Return up to two target creature cards each with power 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UW12 Binding Sun
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. Creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: UW13 Guardian Leyline
card.text: You have hexproof. Creatures can't attack you or planeswalkers you control unless their controller pays {2} for each of those creatures.

card.name: UW14 Leyline Channeling
card.text: Enchant creature When this enchantment enters, draw a card. Enchanted creature gets +1/+0 and has lifelink.

card.name: UU01 Bar'rykkian Roughrapids
card.text: {U}, {T}: Put a stun counter on target creature. Tap it.

card.name: UU02 Azure Corps Pikeman
card.text: Flash Reach When this creature enters, tap target creature and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: UU03 Azure Corps Blademaster
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. If this creature was modified, draw two cards instead. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: UU04 Cyclone Elder
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature enters, return target nonland permanent an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

card.name: UU06 Sea No Evil
card.text: Counter target creature spell. Its owner creates a 2/1 blue Elemental creature token.

card.name: UU07 Fierce Cunning
card.text: Counter target spell. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: UB01 Bayou Knight
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, each player mills two cards. When this creature dies, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: UB02 Guide to Nowhere
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature enters, target player discards a card at random.

card.name: UB03 Crumbling Earth
card.text: When this creature enters, other Elementals you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. {1}{B}{B}: Return this creature from the graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: UB04 Mak Rutan, Cardinal of Sin
card.text: Whenever another creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {B}{B}, {T}, Exile a creature you control: You draw two cards and lose 2 life.

card.name: UB05 Crow-keeper Wraith
card.text: Treasures you control have "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add two mana of any one color." {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Create a tapped Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: UB06 Swampblood Gorger
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn. • Put a trample counter on this creature.

card.name: UB07 Unpromised Tomorrows
card.text: Destroy target creature. Its controller surveils 1.

card.name: UR01 Floe Elemental
card.text: Kindled (Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: UR02 Kindleblade Wizard
card.text: Kindled (Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) Whenever this creature attacks, other attacking creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. {2}{R}: This creature deals damage to target player equal to its power.

card.name: UR03 Smoldering Charger
card.text: Haste Stampede — Whenever this creature attacks, defending player may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If they don't, exile the top two cards of your library. You may cast one of those cards this turn without paying its mana cost.

card.name: UR04 Vecthros, Tyrant of Riches
card.text: Flying Whenever a player sacrifices a nontoken permanent, create a tapped Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: UG01 Cor-Bask Flautist
card.text: {2}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: UG02 Bramblewolf
card.text: Infusion — When this creature enters, if you gained life this turn, draw a card. Whenever you gain life, gain that much life plus 1 instead.

card.name: UG03 Protector of the Deep Forests
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, another target creature you control deals damage to target creature an opponent controls equal to its power.

card.name: UG04 Lost Traveller
card.text: When this creature enters, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. If you gained life this turn, return target card instead.

card.name: UG06 Overgrown Ridgeback
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature attacks, reveal the top card of your library. You gain life equal to its mana value, then you may put it on the bottom.

card.name: UG05 Heletcha, Oracle of Life
card.text: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. This ability triggers once per turn. Infusion — Creatures you control with counters on them have hexproof as long as you gained life this turn.

card.name: UG07 Rampaging Carnosaur
card.text: Trample Stampede — Whenever this creature attacks, defending player may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If they don't, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: CG13 Nature's Wisdom
card.text: When this enchantment enters and whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, scry 1 and gain 2 life.

card.name: RW02
card.text: Kindled (Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.)

card.name: RM02 The Abhorrent One
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) The Abhorrent One's power is equal to the number of cards in your graveyard. Whenever you attack, surveil 2.

card.name: RM01 Spirit Rider
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever a nonland card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, create a 0/1 blue Spirit creature token with exalted. If that card's mana value was 4 or greater, create two of those tokens instead.

card.name: RM02 Lyth, Kindleborn Phoenix
card.text: Flying, kindled (Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) When Lyth enters, if you control 3 or more Elementals, draw a card. {B}{B}{R}: Return Lyth from the graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: RM01 Mycelial Thrall
card.text: Stampede — Whenever this creature attacks, defending player may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If they don't, draw a card and put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: RM01 Faestone Tortoise
card.text: Trample Other creatures you control get +1/+1 and have vigilance. Whenever another creature you control dies, draw a card. This ability triggers only once per turn.

card.name: RM04 Manasynth Wave
card.text: Search your library for two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. If you control four or more Elementals, untap up to six lands.

card.name: RM02 Thaskar, Rage of the Sea
card.text: Thaskar enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. Remove a +1/+1 counter from Thaskar: Target modified creature you control can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: RM02 Ikthyll, Duchess of Cor-Bask
card.text: Whenever a player sacrifices a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on Ikthyll. Stampede — Whenever Ikthyll attacks, defending player may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If they don't, Ikthyll gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: RM01 Magma Viper
card.text: Reach, kindled (Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) Whenever this creature enters or attacks, create a 1/1 black and red Elemental creature token.

card.name: RM01 Mounted Merfolk
card.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for an Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Modified creatures you control have ward {2}.

card.name: RM02 Ol'grak, Living Forest
card.text: Whenever you gain life, create half that many 1/1 white Faerie creature tokens with flying, rounded up. As long as it's not your turn, Ol'grak has first strike.

card.name: MM01 Klysma, Sea's Essence
card.text: Vigilance When Klysma enters, put a first strike counter on each of up to two target creatures you control. Whenever Klysma attacks with two or more other modified creatures, draw a card. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: MM01 Whisp, Lone Wanderer
card.text: Flying, exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever Whisp attacks, create a tapped 0/1 blue Spirit creature token with exalted. Whenever Whisp becomes blocked, sacrifice a token.

card.name: MM01 Ryklos, Stampeding Tyrant
card.text: Trample Stampede — When Ryklos attacks, defending player may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If they don't, put two +1/+1 counters on Ryklos. When Ryklos dies, if it had at least twelve counters on it, search your library for a creature card with power 8 or less and put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: MM01 Ekthar, Void Phoenix
card.text: Flying, kindled (Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) When Ekthar enters, if he was cast, he deals damage to target player equal to the number of Elemental cards in your graveyard. {1}{B}{R}, Sacrifice two Elementals: Return Ekthar from the graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: MM01 Vivlokar, Brush Drake
card.text: Flying Whenever Vivlokar becomes tapped, create a number of 1/1 white Faerie creature tokens with flying equal to half its power, rounded up. Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Vivlokar.

card.name: MM02 Blessing of the Lone Wanderer
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, surveil 1, then draw a card.

card.name: MM02 Blessing of the Void Phoenix
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a red Elemental in addition to its other colors and types. When a token creature you control dies, draw a card.

card.name: MM02 Blessing of the Stampede Tyrant
card.text: Stampede — Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, the defending player may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If they don't, Create a 4/4 red and green Elemental creature token with trample.

card.name: MM02 Blessing of the Sea's Essence
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Whenever three or more modified creatures you control attack, create a 2/2 white and blue Elemental creature token with flying.

card.name: MM02 Blessing of the Brush Drake
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature enters under your control, you gain life equal to its mana value. Whenever a token creature enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: CA01 Heroic Catapult
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Destroy target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CA05 Rejuvination Buddy
card.text: {2}, {T}: Put target card from your graveyard on the bottom of your library.

card.name: CA03 Etched Scythe
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+1 and has reach. Equip {2}

card.name: CA02 Quickstrike Dagger

card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: UA01 Jeweled Lens
card.text: When this artifact enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: UA02 Revalation Blade
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+1 and has first strike. Equip {2}

card.name: CL01 Calm-Shores Passage
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, put a land you control on the bottom of your library. {T}: Add {W}{U}.

card.name: CL02 Steady-Climb Passage
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, put a land you control on the bottom of your library. {T}: Add {G}{W}.

card.name: CL03 Infernus Passage
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, put a land you control on the bottom of your library. {T}: Add {B}{R}.

card.name: CL04 Cragbrush Passage
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, put a land you control on the bottom of your library. {T}: Add {R}{G}.

card.name: CL05 Misthollow Passage
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, put a land you control on the bottom of your library. {T}: Add {U}{B}.

card.name: UL02 Verdant Prairie
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: UL04 Kindled Glen
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: UL01 Tidal Expanse
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: UL05 Accursed Aquifer
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: UL03 Volcanic Crypt
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: RL03 Altar of the Phoenix
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) This land enters tapped. {2}{B}{R}: This land becomes a 4/4 Elemental creature until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: RL05 Cathedral of Damnation
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) This land enters tapped. {2}{U}{B}: This land becomes a 4/4 Elemental creature until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: RL02 Vast Countryside
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) This land enters tapped. {2}{G}{W}: This land becomes a 4/4 Elemental creature until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: RL04 Briarthorn Ravine
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) This land enters tapped. {2}{R}{G}: This land becomes a 4/4 Elemental creature until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: UM01 Azure Corps Captain
card.text: Vigilance {W}, {T}: Put a vigilance counter on each of up to two target creatures you control.

card.name: UM01 Stormghast Colossus
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) At the beginning of each end step, if two or more nonland permanent cards entered your graveyard this turn, create a 1/1 blue and black Spirit creature token.

card.name: CB04 Ferocidon Apparition
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature enters, create a 0/1 blue Spirit creature token with exalted.

card.name: UM01 Stampede Charmer
card.text: {T}: Add {R}{G}. Whenever two or more creatures you control attack, target attacking creature you control gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: UM01 Sunbreach Griffin
card.text: Flying At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you have gained 5 or more life this turn, this creature gets +2/+2 and gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Elemental SKL
card.text: Trample

card.name: Faerie SKL
card.text: Flying

card.name: Spirit SKL
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: RL01 Chosen Sea
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) This land enters tapped. {2}{W}{U}: This land becomes a 4/4 Elemental creature until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: Elemental SKL
card.text: Flying

card.name: CM02 Faewhisp
card.text: When this creature enters, put a flying counter on target creature.

card.name: CM01 Wandering Kappa
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature enters, surveil 1, then draw a card. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: CM01 Ashen Sorceress
card.text: Kindled (Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.) Whenever a token you control enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: CM01 Rageleaf Dragon
card.text: Trample

card.name: CM02 Tropical Griffin
card.text: Flying Whenever you gain life, you may draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: CM01 Sentinel Siren
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, put a vigilance counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: CM02 Bar'ryk Leviathan
card.text: When this creature enters, target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. You lose 2 life.

card.name: CM02 Infernus Altisaur
card.text: Reach Whenever another creature you control dies, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: CM02 Cor-bask Rageboar
card.text: Trample, haste

card.name: CM01 Fae-Blessed Lyrist
card.text: Whenever one or more tokens you control enter, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Treasure SKL
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: UU05 Bar'rykkian Coastwing
card.text: Flying Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, create a 0/1 blue Spirit creature token with exalted.
